summary: The network manager divergence is semicolon-only rustfmt noise in proof-of-stake block propagation and poll wake paths; no network manager behavior changed.
notes: Queue entry verified as line 162: M	crates/net/network/src/manager.rs.
The isolated patch only adds semicolons to the proof-of-stake block propagation early return and the Poll::Pending return after scheduling another wake.
No stake-mode guard, new-block announcement, handle-message loop, swarm-event loop, wake scheduling, or poll metrics update behavior changed.
